data.name: NAME_EMPTY
data.value: The name cannot be empty.

data.name: DOCUMENT_EMPTY
data.value: The document number cannot be empty.

data.name: DOCUMENT_INVALID
data.value: The document number is invalid.

data.name: SLUG_EMPTY
data.value: The tenant slug cannot be empty.

data.name: SLUG_INVALID_LENGTH
data.value: The tenant slug must be between 3 and 50 characters.

data.name: SLUG_INVALID_FORMAT
data.value: The tenant slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens, and cannot start or end with a hyphen.

data.name: SLUG_RESERVED
data.value: The slug is a system reserved word.

data.name: EMAIL_EMPTY
data.value: The contact email is required.

data.name: EMAIL_INVALID
data.value: The contact email format is invalid.

data.name: PHONE_EMPTY
data.value: The contact phone is required.

data.name: PHONE_INVALID
data.value: The phone number must be of valid length (between 8 and 20 digits).

data.name: STREET_EMPTY
data.value: The street name is required.

data.name: NUMBER_EMPTY
data.value: The number is required.

data.name: NEIGHBORHOOD_EMPTY
data.value: The neighborhood is required.

data.name: CITY_EMPTY
data.value: The city is required.

data.name: STATE_INVALID
data.value: The state (UF) must be exactly 2 characters.

data.name: ZIPCODE_INVALID
data.value: The ZIP code must contain exactly 8 digits.

data.name: SUBSCRIPTION_END_DATE_INVALID
data.value: The subscription end date cannot be earlier than the start date.

data.name: SUBSCRIPTION_TRIAL_END_DATE_REQUIRED
data.value: Trial subscriptions require a trial end date.

data.name: RESOURCE_LIMITS_INVALID
data.value: The provided resource limits are invalid.

data.name: TENANT_TERMINATED_CANNOT_REACTIVATE
data.value: A terminated tenant cannot be reactivated.

data.name: SUSPENSION_REASON_EMPTY
data.value: The suspension reason must be provided.

data.name: TENANT_TERMINATED_CANNOT_SUSPEND
data.value: Cannot suspend an already terminated tenant.

data.name: TENANT_TERMINATED_CANNOT_DEACTIVATE
data.value: Cannot deactivate an already terminated tenant.

data.name: TENANT_PAST_DUE_INVALID_STATUS
data.value: Only active or trialing tenants can be marked as past due.

data.name: PHONE_COUNTRY_CODE_INVALID
data.value: The phone country code is invalid.

data.name: NAME_INVALID_LENGTH
data.value: The name must be between 2 and 100 characters.

data.name: SUSPENSION_REASON_INVALID
data.value: The suspension reason must be between 5 and 500 characters.

data.name: SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED
data.value: The subscription is required.

data.name: CONTACT_REQUIRED
data.value: The contact is required.

data.name: ADDRESS_REQUIRED
data.value: The address is required.

data.name: STATE_REQUIRED
data.value: The state is required.

data.name: ZIPCODE_REQUIRED
data.value: The ZIP code is required.

data.name: DURATION_REQUIRED
data.value: The duration period is required.

data.name: SLUG_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: The slug already exists.

data.name: DOCUMENT_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: The document number already exists.

data.name: DOCUMENT_REQUIRED
data.value: The document is required.

data.name: TENANT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Tenant not found.

data.name: ID_EMPTY
data.value: The ID is required.

data.name: PLAN_INVALID
data.value: The selected plan is invalid.

data.name: PAGE_NUMBER_INVALID
data.value: Page number must be greater than or equal to 1.

data.name: PAGE_SIZE_INVALID
data.value: Page size must be between 1 and 100.
